summary: 5-phase plan for 55+ enriched operator equivalence tests: infrastructure setup, Level 1 operators (neg/top/next/prev, 20 tests), Level 2 operators (and/or/diamond/some_future/some_past, 25 tests), Level 3 operators with nested combinations and boundary sensitivity (10+5+6 tests), and gate validation. All formulas pre-validated passing at M=2.
